summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of fantasyTimeline app enhancements: Create New Timeline feature and Auto-fit zoom functionality. Both major features are working correctly with minor persistence consideration.

integration_issues.issue: Created local timeline may not persist between browser sessions/page reloads
integration_issues.description: Test Timeline was successfully created and functional but disappeared from dropdown in later tests, suggesting possible localStorage persistence issue

passed_tests: Timeline Picker dropdown shows 'Create New Timeline' button
Clicking 'Create New Timeline' opens the form modal correctly
Form displays all required fields: Timeline Title, First Track Name, Calendar Name
Form displays all optional fields: Description, Theme selector, Abbreviation, Color, Epoch, Year Range
Form validation prevents submission with empty required fields
Submitting filled form creates new timeline successfully
New timeline appears in dropdown with 'Local' badge
App automatically switches to newly created timeline
Auto-fit zoom functionality appears to work - timelines fill screen width appropriately
Form modal closes properly after successful submission
Color picker for track colors functions properly
All form inputs accept and display entered values correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Consider investigating localStorage persistence behavior for created local timelines to ensure they remain available across browser sessions. The core functionality works perfectly, but data persistence could be enhanced.
success_percentage: frontend: 95% - All core functionality working, minor persistence consideration
